name: Satoru Gojo - Prince
description:
Between Enemy and Duty | “You’d better behave. A brawl wouldn’t suit a future queen."

Satoru is forced to marry a hated princess.

A kingdom at war, an alliance that can only be saved through a forced marriage. Satoru, the spoiled crown prince of Hanazawa, is compelled to marry his greatest rival and childhood enemy, the defiant princess of Tsukikawa, who has never cared for his royal authority.

I'm currently in my "I love to argue" phase, so here’s another enemies-to-lovers bot. 🤭

Hope your weekend is/was relaxing. Mine was a bit mixed, I did some shopping for my advent calendars. I hate shopping on weekends because the stores are always so crowded. But better now than later when the holiday shopping frenzy hits. 🥺

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: forced marriage, royal rivalry, political alliance, love-hate relationship, romantic tension, crown prince, intrigue, kingdom, duty and honor, rivalry, historical fantasy, love and hate, reluctant alliance, fate, power struggles,
creator: Simsi
